creator: Nakai@Mlab.t.u-tokyo.ac.jp
text:
I wrote no description at MASTER_SITES in Makefile, so I have added just now.
Ports itself has no changes.
ftp://ftp.noc.titech.ac.jp/pub/tmp/aki/in.coming/xrubik.tgz

			Yukihiro Nakai
			<Nakai@Mlab.t.u-tokyo.ac.jp>

Fix: 

port commited (with some minor changes).

Some comments:  In the makefile, please don't remove the $Id$ keyword line,
I just have to put it back in.  Also be careful, in the PLIST you had
an absolutel pathname for the man page.  All in all, a very, very good
job!
